key.name: model
key.description: faster-whisper model to use (e.g. tiny.en, base.en, small.en, medium.en, large-v3).

key.name: input-device
key.description: Substring of the mic name, or a numeric device index. Empty = system default.

key.name: chunk-seconds
key.description: How many seconds of audio to accumulate before transcribing.

key.name: idle-timeout-never
key.description: If true, the daemon never auto-shuts down due to inactivity.

key.name: idle-timeout-minutes
key.description: Minutes of inactivity before the daemon auto-shuts down. Ignored if idle-timeout-never is true.

key.name: cpu-fallback
key.description: Fall back to CPU if GPU/CUDA is unavailable. If false and CUDA fails, the daemon exits.
